title: Contract Analysis
description: Upload any contract. LexAI extracts key clauses, obligations, risks and deadlines in seconds. Supports PDF, DOCX and scanned docs.

title: Case Law Research
description: Ask a legal question in plain language. Get citable jurisprudence from Argentina, Chile and Colombia ranked by relevance.

title: Deadline Tracking
description: Never miss a filing. LexAI extracts all procedural deadlines from your documents and syncs them to your calendar automatically.

title: Brief Drafting
description: Generate first drafts of demand letters, responses and memos. Trained on Argentine procedural law. Edit and refine with your voice.

title: Attorney-Client Privilege
description: Your documents never train our models. End-to-end encryption, data residency options, and SOC 2 Type II certification.

title: Team Collaboration
description: Share matter workspaces, assign tasks, and annotate documents together. Track who reviewed what and when.
